title: Series 1 - Individuals - Canada.ca
content:
## Series 1 - Individuals
This Series will contain folios discussing the following subjects:
Folio 1 Health and Medical
Folio 3 Family Unit Issues
Folio 4 Personal Credits
Folio 5 Transfers of Income, Property or Rights to Third Parties
Folio 6 Deceased Individuals
